question: How should rforge itself be improved, based on evidence from real rforge usage across all projects under /home/xel/git/*?
method: OSS/evidence study over saved rforge artifacts (no live API calls). Aggregated 128 provenance.json files across 9 projects with jq; deduped and counted error strings; confirmed directory-structure patterns by listing.
errors: No live scholarly API calls made; evidence is observational from saved artifacts only.
Provenance schema drift across rforge versions (E2) makes per-version error rates approximate.
Adoption counts are lower bounds (a feature may be used without leaving a tracked artifact).
